title: [Skyship, Living Corridor]
description: The metallic smell of blood lingers with sweet notes of ripening decay.  Covered gigas corpses line the bulkheads, each with thick grey sheets placed atop them, concealing the remains from view.  The metal floors are discolored with dried crimson stains, as are most of the sheets.  In most places these corpses are stacked several bodies high with the concealed figures packed tightly to fit as many as possible.
